ogTitle: Wynnum West vs Wyreema: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wynnum West and Wyreema.
heading: Wynnum West vs Wyreema — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wynnum West, Queensland and Wyreema, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wynnum West has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Wyreema (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wynnum West or Wyreema safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wynnum West has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Wyreema scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wynnum West scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Wyreema scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wynnum West or Wyreema?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wynnum West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
